metadata: _Reply context:_ LAST CALL — Bonus Crew Packs End Friday! , Time is almost up. The bonus promotional crew packs that ship with the Cultivation Claims, VZUS Arma, and Calico Flattop will be removed on Friday, June 12 at 9:00 AM PT. The assets themselves stay on the market afterward; only the bundled bonus crew packs are tied to this window. We'll run the snapshot of eligible purchases once it closes. Here's a recap of the bonuses on offer: #1 CULTIVATION CLAIMS (TIERS 1–5) Tier 1: $15 // 1x silver 1 crew pack , Tier 2: $75 // 3x gold 1 crew pack , Tier 3: $274 // 1x platinum 5 crew pack , Tier 4: $639 // 2x platinum 5 crew pack + 1x gold 5 crew pack , Tier 5: $1,970 // 6x platinum 5 crew pack , | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/CULTyJq7cqCyTxcReRffiGgv3XrKJCfBhYVVrkdNVgSV/?symbol=ATLAS #2 VZUS ARMA VZUS Arma: $81 // 3x gold 1 crew pack , | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/VZA31QjDrGs6rEXZs6JN2shsG6GbWZZst51qUHNvNnX/ #3 CALICO FLATTOP Calico Flattop: $3,050 // 12x platinum 5 crew pack , | Get it here: https://play.staratlas.com/market/CALHEsUGywdyXybMi3DAUgWCNZwxP55Wj2Ean8wXqho4/ Secure your assets before Friday, 9:00 AM PT and claim your bonus crew packs while they last. @everyone
